headline: Marriott, Stock Of The Day, Near Buy Zone As 2026 FIFA World Cup Looms
summary: Marriott International is IBD Stock Of The Day after an earnings beat-and-raise earlier in May. Marriott stock undercut a buy point in intraday Friday action but travel tailwinds remain.  In addition, top-performing mutual funds Fidelity Blue Chip Growth and Fidelity Growth Company have opened new positions in the hotel operator.  Meanwhile, on Friday Bank of America analysts hiked their price target on Hyatt Hotels by $2 to $221.

headline: Dow Jones Futures Rise As Dell, NetApp Surge On Earnings; Oil Falls On U.S.-Iran Deal Hopes
summary: The stock market rose to fresh highs Thursday on a reported interim U.S.-Iran deal. Dell soared overnight on earnings.

headline: The Iran war is providing an unexpected boost to secondary city travel in Asia-Pacific
summary: Trips to smaller "secondary cities" in Asia-Pacific are getting an added boost this summer, as the Iran war is spurring travelers to plan trips closer to home.
